questions.question: Who is worthy to open the scroll with seven seals?
options: The Lion of the tribe of Judah (the Lamb)
questions.correct: The Lion of the tribe of Judah (the Lamb)
questions.feedback: The Lion of Judah, the Root of David, has triumphed and can open the scroll.

questions.question: The Lamb appeared as if it had been what?
questions.feedback: A Lamb looking as if it had been slain stood at the center of the throne.

questions.question: John wept because no one was found worthy to open the scroll.
questions.feedback: John wept and wept because no one was found worthy to open the scroll.

questions.question: The Lamb had seven horns and seven _____, which are the seven spirits of God.
questions.feedback: Seven eyes are the seven spirits of God sent out into all the earth.

questions.question: With your blood you purchased for God persons from every tribe and language and people and _____.
questions.feedback: The Lamb purchased people from every tribe, language, people, and nation.
